meta.title: Boa Massa — Artisan Bakery & Coffee
meta.description: Handcrafted pastries, fresh bread, and specialty coffee in the heart of Madrid.

hero.title: Boa Massa
hero.subtitle: Artisan Bakery & Coffee
hero.description: Handcrafted pastries, freshly baked bread, and specialty coffee — made with love every morning.

about.title: Baked Fresh, Served with Love
about.description: At Boa Massa, we believe that great baking starts with the finest ingredients and a deep respect for tradition. Every croissant, every loaf, every churro is crafted by hand — because some things are worth doing the old-fashioned way.

churro.name: Classic Churros
churro.description: Crispy on the outside, soft inside. Served with chocolate.

latte.name: Café Latte
latte.description: Silky espresso with perfectly steamed milk.

pastry.name: Almond Pastry
pastry.description: Delicate puff pastry filled with almond cream.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Everything is baked fresh daily using the finest ingredients.

butterCroissant.name: Butter Croissant
butterCroissant.description: Classic French croissant with rich, golden layers.

chocolateCroissant.name: Chocolate Croissant
chocolateCroissant.description: Flaky pastry filled with premium dark chocolate.

almondPastry.name: Almond Pastry
almondPastry.description: Delicate puff pastry with a sweet almond cream filling.

classicChurros.name: Classic Churros
classicChurros.description: Crispy fried dough dusted with cinnamon sugar, served with chocolate sauce.

sourdoughLoaf.name: Sourdough Loaf
sourdoughLoaf.description: Naturally leavened with a crisp crust and tangy crumb.

baguette.name: Artisan Baguette
baguette.description: Crusty exterior, airy interior — perfect with butter.

wholeWheat.name: Whole Wheat Bread
wholeWheat.description: Hearty and wholesome, made with stone-ground flour.

latte.name: Café Latte
latte.description: Silky espresso with perfectly steamed milk.

cappuccino.name: Cappuccino
cappuccino.description: Equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and velvety foam.

hotChocolate.name: Hot Chocolate
hotChocolate.description: Rich and creamy, made with real Belgian chocolate.

seasonalTart.name: Seasonal Fruit Tart
seasonalTart.description: Buttery tart shell filled with pastry cream and seasonal fruits.

croqueMadame.name: Croque Madame
croqueMadame.description: Toasted brioche with ham, gruyère, béchamel, and a fried egg.

granolaBowl.name: Granola Bowl
granolaBowl.description: House-made granola with Greek yogurt, honey, and fresh berries.

findUs.title: Where to Find Us
findUs.subtitle: We'd love to see you. Stop by for a coffee and a pastry.

footer.about: Boa Massa is an artisan bakery and coffee shop in the heart of Madrid, crafting fresh pastries and specialty coffee daily.
